attendance.international_check_in.notification.emai:
Hi {{user_firstname}},

Great news! Your {{plan_name}} plan gives you access to select gyms and studios across {{country_name}}, at no extra cost. Simply open the Wellhub app and check in as you normally would.

While you’re abroad, keep in mind that online live classes are not available.

You can find more information about international check-ins in our :help_center_link:.

Enjoy your time abroad, and your workouts, too!
{{user_firstname}}, you can enjoy Wellhub in {{country_name}}, too!
Check in to a local gym or studio today

booking.class_slot_details.section.how_to_checki: Check-in opens 30 min before class starts and closes 30 min after it ends.
Free cancellation window: You can cancel this class up until {{date}} at {{time}}. After that, it will count as a missed class, and you’ll lose this check-in.

Check-in opens: {{minutes_before_starts}} minutes before class starts. Late cancellations and no-shows: If you cancel a class late or forget to check in {{blocker_threshold}} times in a month, you won't be able to book until the following month. Also, any future sessions you've booked will be canceled.

Missing or late cancelling a class: If you miss or late cancel a class, you can continue to use walk-ins and wellness apps. To book again, you’ll have the option to either pay the missed class fee or wait until the following month. Helpful info: Turn on notifications to get reminders about your class and check-in time.

Missing or late cancelling classes: If you miss or late cancel {{blocker_threshold}} classes in a calendar month, you can continue to use walk-ins and wellness apps. To book again, you’ll have the option to pay the missed class fee or wait until the following month. Helpful info: Turn on notifications to get reminders about your class and check-in time.

Check-in opens: {{minutes_before_starts}} minutes before class starts. Late cancellations and no-shows: If you late cancel or miss {{blocker_threshold}} class in a calendar month, your bookings will be put on hold until the month ends. To resume bookings sooner, you can ask the person who manages your subscription to pay a fee. This hold won't affect walk-ins and wellness apps. They will always be available to you.

challenge_info.2025_october_extra.halloween.description:
🎃 The challenge
The Halloween curse will keep you still and take away your active thrill. By midnight, October 31, cast your spell, conjure 100,000 points to get strong and well.

🧪 The magic potion ingredients
For spooky steps, a point you'll score, and for each check-in, get 10,000 more! Mix steps and check-ins, do your best, to break the curse and pass the test.

🏅 The final reward
Those who hit the goal by Halloween night will earn a badge of wondrous might! A supreme title, for all to see, "The Halloween Cursebreaker" you will be!

challenge_info.2026_carnival.description:
🥁 The rhythmic challenge
The world is moving to the rhythm! Channel that Brazilian carnival energy into your workouts this week. Your goal is to collect 35,000 points in 7 days to keep up with the beat and join the global parade.

🏃 How to join the parade
Turn up the volume and get moving! Sync your steps or check in at your favorite gyms and studios to earn points. Let the carnival spirit fuel your progress. Every move adds to the rhythm.
challenge_info.2026_carnival.title: Chase the Carnival Beat
challenge_info.2026_easter.description:
🥚 The egg hunt begins 
It’s time to spring into action! From April 1st to 7th, join our special Easter challenge and track down your new personal best. Your goal is to collect 35,000 points in 7 days to complete the hunt and unlock your exclusive holiday badge.

🧺 How to fill your basket
Get moving and collect those points! Earn them by tracking your daily steps or checking in to your favorite gyms and studios. Keep your energy high, hop to it, and finish the hunt strong.

🍫 Your sweet reward
The best treats are the ones you earn! Hit the 35,000 goal in time, and the special Easter Wellness Hunt badge is yours to keep. Ready for the hunt?
challenge_info.2026_easter.title: The Easter Wellness Hunt
challenge_info.2026_january_booster.70k_points.descript:

challenge_info.2026_january_extra.newyear.description:
🌟 The resolution
Every new year brings new goals into your life. This time, the most important resolution is doing things your way. Ready to turn your 2026 resolutions into real, healthy habits?

🏃 The challenge
Start your year strong from day one. Gather 150,000 points by the end of January to complete the challenge. Earn points by checking in, syncing steps, or doing both—whatever fits your plan.

🏅 The prize
Checking in with your wellbeing is the real prize, but everyone loves a new, shiny badge. Hit the goal to earn the special “Wellness Season” badge and celebrate 2026 energy.

challenge_info.2026_rioopen.description:
Dentro ou fora da quadra, corpo e mente jogam juntos: entre no esquenta pro Rio Open 2026! 
🎾As três melhores pontuações ganharão um kit Wellhub exclusivo. Vale check-ins em qualquer modalidade – só não vale ficar parado.

Faça check-in nas suas atividades favoritas para marcar pontos. Quanto mais check-ins, mais perto você fica do match point! Confira o regulamento completo em: wellhub.com/desafiojogandojuntos
challenge_info.2026_rioopen.title: Rotina de Atleta no Rio Open
challenge_info.2026_womens_day.description:
🏃‍♀️ Move boldly, live well
Let’s celebrate the strength of women all around the world! Honor International Women's Day by keeping your energy high and your habits strong. You have 15 days (March 8–22) to dedicate time to yourself and reach 60,000 points. When you hit the goal, the special Women in Motion badge is yours to keep.

💪 How to keep moving
Make wellness a priority! Earn points by tracking your daily steps or checking in to your favorite gyms and studios. Let this challenge be the spark that fuels your routine and celebrates your journey.

🔥 Week 4 of 4: This is it – make wellbeing a lifestyle! Reach 55,000 points to lock in those great habits and boost your resilience for good.  
🎖️ Complete all the challenges in the weekly series and earn a special badge!

challenge_info.wellhub_september_booster.title: September 70k Points in 7 Days
challenge_info.wellhub_september_monthly.description:
Build healthy habits in every move! ⚡️ Sync steps, check in at partners, or do both. You’ll find out just how good it feels to check in with your wellbeing. 

🔄 A recurring challenge
This is a recurring challenge that repeats every month. To make building your habits easy, you'll be automatically enrolled in the next one. You can leave at any time.
challenge_info.wellhub_september_monthly.title: September 150k Points
challenge_info.wellhub_september_week1.description:
🔥 Week 1 of 4: Kick off with consistency! Hit 40,000 points to set your rhythm and establish your basic wellbeing routine.
🎖️ Complete all the challenges in the weekly series and earn a special badge!
challenge_info.wellhub_september_week1.title: September Solid Start (1 of 4)

🎖️ Complete all the challenges in the weekly series and earn a special badge!
challenge_info.wellhub_september_week2.title: September Progression Push (2 of 4)
challenge_info.wellhub_september_week3.description:
🔥 Week 3 of 4: Time to level up! Aim for 50,000 points this week. This is where your strong habits become unbreakable!  
🎖️ Complete all the challenges in the weekly series and earn a special badge!
challenge_info.wellhub_september_week3.title: September Level-up (3 of 4)

Located 3 blocks away from the subway, WellhubFit is the right choice if you're looking for improving your health in a different way. Get ready to feel good with our range of activities that will make you move the way you like best: pilates, yoga, jump, cycling, or fit dance.

Book a class to know us. If you have any questions, our team of instructors will be right there to help you out!

For you:

  • Choose a plan
  • Confirm the subscription and pay
  • Send the signup link to your family member

For your family member:

  • Use the signup link to create an account
  • Download the Wellhub app
  • Enjoy top gyms, studios, and apps

original.value: [solidcore] is a 50-minute, full body workout that uses slow, controlled movements to work your muscle fibers to failure—yep, failure. This low-impact process forces your muscles to rebuild a more sculpted, stronger and [solid] you. Each class has a certified [solidcore] coach who motivates you to push yourself further than you would on your own. The studios are raw, inspiring, welcoming and you are guaranteed a personalized experience every time.

BEFORE VISITING, you MUST reserve a class in advance using the schedule on the studio's Wellhub profile. Check your email for the monthly door code and additional signup and check-in information after booking.

EACH VISIT, click "Check-In" on your app and show your confirmation to a staff member to let us know you are visiting from Wellhub so the studio can check you in.

*Classes for the following month will not be bookable until the 25th each month.

This low-impact process forces your muscles to rebuild a more sculpted, stronger and [solid] you. Each class has a certified [solidcore] coach who motivates you to push yourself further than you would on your own. The studios are raw, inspiring, welcoming and you are guaranteed a personalized experience every time.
about.goodToKnow:
BEFORE VISITING, you MUST reserve a class in advance using the schedule on the studio's Wellhub profile. Check your email for the monthly door code and additional signup and check-in information after booking.

EACH VISIT, click "Check-In" on your app and show your confirmation to a staff member to let us know you are visiting from Wellhub so the studio can check you in.

*Classes for the following month will not be bookable until the 25th each month.

reviewsSummary.summary: Engaging instructors create a welcoming environment for newcomers while delivering challenging workouts. Staff is attentive and knowledgeable, helping members maintain proper form. Classes offer a perfect balance of intensity and encouragement.

value.value: Our signature workout: 50-minutes of low-impact, high-intensity, resistance-based strength training. Each class is meticulously programmed to effectively target your core, obliques, lower body, and upper body, by focusing on one muscle group at a time. This class is designed for individuals of all levels, as your coach will offer modifications and amplifications to meet your specific goals. Please note we recommend that you complete 3-5 Starter50: Intro To [solidcore] or Foundation50: Build Your Basics classes before attending.
